attacking_style: Attacks on super-steep gradients with 3-10km to go, exploiting explosive ramps rather than sustained tempo climbs. Frequently launches long-range attacks 2+ climbs from finish, forcing extended chases rather than waiting for summit finishes.
team_tactics: Trek team chronically weak in TTTs and domestique support, losing 1:15+ in team events. PANTANO provided pacemaking on earlier climb sections, but Contador largely isolated on final ascents, forcing solo efforts without lead-out trains.
terrain_preference: Excels on super-steep ramps and explosive gradients where power-to-weight peaks. Exposed on sustained moderate climbs and time trials. Descending prowess allows him to nullify gaps created on climbs.
vulnerability: Collapses on sustained efforts in stage race second halves, particularly after opening-week energy expenditure. Crosswind splits expose weak team positioning. Loses 2+ minutes on moderate-gradient tempo climbs controlled by Sky.
key_patterns: Attacks 3-10km out on steep ramps, exploiting explosive gradients over sustained power (6+ instances)
Long-range attacks 2+ climbs from finish force extended chases, holds virtual lead deep (4 instances)
Third-week resurgence pattern: drops badly mid-race then rebounds for stage wins/aggression (5 instances)
Trek team consistently 1+ minute down in TTTs, isolating him early in stage races (3 instances)
Opportunistic exploitation of rival mechanicals/chaos rather than pure climbing dominance (3 instances)
Collapses on sustained tempo climbs controlled by Sky, losing 2+ minutes on moderate gradients (4 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: Career-ending 2017 showed declining sustained climbing power with early-race collapses, though retained explosive attacking ability and third-week resurgences through opportunism rather than pure strength.
